decisions.summary: Session-tree slot support belongs in the server session discovery layer, not the React tree, because FeatureItem and SessionNode already render multiple per-issue sessions and route selection by sessionId.
Slot session JSONL lookup must derive the workspace path from the slot number so agent-pan-<issue>-<n> resolves against workspaces/feature-<issue>-slot-<n> instead of the base workspace.

Frontend agent output should normalize slot work session ids with the same base-issue pattern as the server so selecting agent-<issue>-<slot> keeps ActivityView bound to the parent issue while Terminal stays bound to the slot session.

hazards.summary: Final UI verification must use the built dashboard server under Node 22, not Bun, or PTY-backed terminal behavior can fail independently of the PAN-974 code changes.
hazards.mitigation: Run npm run build before browser verification and validate the dashboard through the Node 22 dist server path.

resumePoint.description: Both PAN-974 beads are implemented. Next: run broader verification for the session-tree slot work, then build the dashboard, verify slot selection in the browser against the Node 22 server, and only then do the final push and pan done flow.

beadsMapping.workspace-448: Server-side slot session discovery, issue mapping, and slot workspace JSONL resolution
beadsMapping.workspace-52u: Frontend slot-aware issue/session handling and tests

sessionHistory.note: Completed bead workspace-448 implementation by adding slot-aware session discovery in projects.ts, slot-aware tmux issue extraction in ws-rpc.ts, and focused regression tests.
Completed bead workspace-52u by making AgentOutputPanel derive the parent issue from slot session ids and adding focused derivation/render tests for swarm slot sessions.
